name: prompt-rewriter
description: Rewrite bloated AI prompts into clean, outcome-based format. Strips compensating complexity built for 2022 models from your 2026 workflows.

plugins.name: prompt-rewriter
plugins.description: Classify, rewrite, and diff any system prompt. Removes scaffolding, duct-tape, and format micromanagement. Outputs clean 4-component format with before/after diff and risk items.
